scripts.dev:electron: wait-on dist/main.js http://localhost:8080 && cross-env NODE_ENV=development ELECTRON_RENDERER_URL=http://localhost:8080 node -e "const cp = require(\"child_process\"); const env = Object.fromEntries(Object.entries(process.env).filter(([key, value]) => !key.startsWith(\"=\") && typeof value !== \"undefined\")); delete env.ELECTRON_RUN_AS_NODE; const command = process.platform === \"win32\" ? \"electron.cmd\" : \"electron\"; const child = cp.spawn(command, [\".\"], { stdio: \"inherit\", env, shell: process.platform === \"win32\" }); child.on(\"exit\", (code) => process.exit(code ?? 0)); child.on(\"error\", (error) => { console.error(error); process.exit(1); });"
scripts.test:prod: npm run build && npm run test:coverage
scripts.test:all: npm run test && npm run test:e2e
scripts.analyze:architecture: npm run analyze:architecture:boundaries && npm run analyze:architecture:layers
scripts.analyze:solid: npm run analyze:cycles && npm run analyze:duplicates
scripts.analyze:all: npm run lint && npm run analyze:complexity && npm run analyze:architecture && npm run analyze:solid && npm run analyze:security
scripts.guard:commit: npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run analyze:architecture && npm run analyze:solid && jest --runInBand
scripts.quality:check: npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run analyze:architecture && npm run analyze:solid && npm run test:coverage && npm run build
